item.title: 12.2]全球正在老年化！可不可以不變老？5個方法「老的比別人慢」！【生活】 | 維思維
item.itunes:title: 12.2]全球正在老年化！可不可以不變老？5個方法「老的比別人慢」！【生活】 | 維思維
item.itunes:author: 維思維WeisWay
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gJM1VvwoaWs 結帳時輸入折扣碼「weisway」，售價再折 300 元！ 點擊前往課程頁面：https://bit.ly/3TkxADp 如果你已經超過 30 歲，或正在面對老化的焦慮，不妨來看看姜冠宇醫師的【老化全方位應對手冊】！ ------------------------ 【歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD 【訂閱按這裡】 https://bit.ly/38OqWfl 【維C Line貼圖】 https://line.me/S/sticker/13483644 【目錄】 00:00 介紹 00:53 全球正在老年化 02:48 你希望長生不老嗎？ 04:09 老化機制 08:17 逆齡真的存在？ 09:13 姜冠宇線上課程 10:24 如何老得比別人慢 14:59 精選留言+ 記得分享喔 -------------------------------------------- 【想當YouTuber的按這裡】 數據分析工具（免費） https://bit.ly/2CurquY 想學動畫！（有免費的） https://bit.ly/393B8kd ---------------------------- 【其他平台按這裡】 Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/ ---------------------------- 【推薦你的影片】 你有「反社會人格」？：https://bit.ly/38UyyNd 為什麼鏡子裡的你比照片好看！https://bit.ly/2WaJDEM 如何控制夢？ ： https://bit.ly/2AQZb9l 為什麼聽自己錄音會覺得難聽？https://bit.ly/3elDRXh 失眠？這樣做！: https://bit.ly/2Cm6DJT 你到底是「內向」還是「社交恐懼症」！：https://bit.ly/2OgD9Qn -------------------- 【播放列表】 心理學小知識 https://bit.ly/3gUi1LR 生活小知識： https://bit.ly/3j42fjI 科學小知識 https://bit.ly/2DyyDuu 健康小知識 https://bit.ly/3egiPJj 動畫謎語 https://bit.ly/3iyXDDs ---------------------------- 【參考資料】 https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tithonus | Tithonus - Wikipedia https://www.gcores.com/articles/137159 | 希腊神话中玫瑰色手指的曙光女神：厄俄斯 | 机核 GCORES https://www.bostonmagazine.com/health/2019/10/29/david-sinclair/ | Has Harvard's David Sinclair Found the Fountain of Youth? https://tw.news.yahoo.com/%E6%88%91%E5%80%91%E6%87%89%E8%A9%B2%E6%B0%B8%E9%81%A0%E6%B4%BB%E8%91%97%E5%97%8E-%E7%9F%BD%E8%B0%B7%E8%88%88%E8%B5%B7%E8%BF%BD%E6%B1%82%E6%B0%B8%E7%94%9F%E7%86%B1%E6%BD%AE-%E7%A0%94%E7%A9%B6-%E6%B2%BB%E7%99%92%E8%A1%B0%E8%80%81-%E8%97%A5%E7%89%A9-014001415.html | 「我們應該永遠活著嗎？！」矽谷興起追求永生熱潮，研究「治癒衰老」藥物 https://www.cell.com/cell/fulltext/S0092-8674(13)00645-4?_returnURL=https://linkinghub.elsevier.com/retrieve/pii/S0092867413006454?showall=true | The Hallmarks of Aging: Cell https://blogs.scientificamerican.com/guest-blog/beyond-resveratrol-the-anti-aging-nad-fad/ | Beyond Resveratrol: The Anti-Aging NAD Fad - Scientific American Blog Network https://perspectivesinmedicine.cshlp.org/content/5/12/a025965.full | Has the Rate of Human Aging Already Been Modified? https://www.msdmanuals.cn/home/older-people%E2%80%99s-health-issues/the-aging-body/changes-in-the-body-with-aging | 伴随衰老出现的身体变化 - 老年人的健康问题 - 《默沙东诊疗手册大众版》 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ySAbF9h2vDg | Why I Spend $2 Million A Year To Look 18 Years Old Again - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NdZHo3xuZvw | YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EPBFuzkABBo | You trying the impossible? Go to sleep. - YouTube https://www.un.org/development/desa/pd/sites/www.un.org.development.desa.pd/files/undesa_pd_2022_wpp_key-messages.pdf | undesa_pd_2022_wpp_key-messages.pdf https://www.un.org/development/desa/pd/sites/www.un.org.development.desa.pd/files/wpp2022_summary_of_results.pdf | wpp2022_summary_of_results.pdf https://ws.ndc.gov.tw/Download.ashx?u=LzAwMS9hZG1pbmlzdHJhdG9yLzEwL3JlbGZpbGUvMC80ODI4LzZkNDE5ZDM4LThmNzktNDk3ZS05NmJlLTY0OGE2YTM2OWM1My5wZGY%3D\u0026n=6KuW6KGhMTEtMTBfNC7kurrlj6PogIHljJblsIjovK9f5YWo55CD5Lq65Y%2Bj6ICB5YyW5LmL54%2B%2B5rOB6IiH6Lao5YuiLnBkZg%3D%3D\u0026icon=..pdf | Download.ashx https://www.zhihu.com/question/22786066 | 什么是表观遗传学，为什么说基因遗传学被表观遗传学动摇了，请用外行能听懂的方式讲讲？ - 知乎 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9nXop2lLDa4 | David Sinclair | Why We Age and Why We Don't Have To | Talks at Google - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=n9IxomBusuw | Dr. David Sinclair: The Biology of Slowing \u0026 Reversing Aging | Huberman Lab Podcast #52 - YouTube https://www.cdc.gov/genomics/disease/epigenetics.htm#:~:text=While%20genetic%20changes%20can%20alter,and%20your%20behaviors%20and%20environment. | What is Epigenetics? | CDC https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E9%81%97%E4%BC%A0%E5%AD%A6 | 遺傳學 - 維基百科，自由的百科全書 https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E8%A1%A8%E8%A7%80%E9%81%BA%E5%82%B3%E5%AD%B8 | 表觀遺傳學 - 維基百科，自由的百科全書
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gJM1VvwoaWs 結帳時輸入折扣碼「weisway」，售價再折 300 元！ 點擊前往課程頁面：https://bit.ly/3TkxADp 如果你已經超過 30 歲，或正在面對老化的焦慮，不妨來看看姜冠宇醫師的【老化全方位應對手冊】！ ------------------------ 【歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD 【訂閱按這裡】 https://bit.ly/38OqWfl 【維C Line貼圖】 https://line.me/S/sticker/13483644 【目錄】 00:00 介紹 00:53 全球正在老年化 02:48 你希望長生不老嗎？ 04:09 老化機制 08:17 逆齡真的存在？ 09:13 姜冠宇線上課程 10:24 如何老得比別人慢 14:59 精選留言+ 記得分享喔 -------------------------------------------- 【想當YouTuber的按這裡】 數據分析工具（免費） https://bit.ly/2CurquY 想學動畫！（有免費的） https://bit.ly/393B8kd ---------------------------- 【其他平台按這裡】 Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/ ---------------------------- 【推薦你的影片】 你有「反社會人格」？：https://bit.ly/38UyyNd 為什麼鏡子裡的你比照片好看！https://bit.ly/2WaJDEM 如何控制夢？ ： https://bit.ly/2AQZb9l 為什麼聽自己錄音會覺得難聽？https://bit.ly/3elDRXh 失眠？這樣做！: https://bit.ly/2Cm6DJT 你到底是「內向」還是「社交恐懼症」！：https://bit.ly/2OgD9Qn -------------------- 【播放列表】 心理學小知識 https://bit.ly/3gUi1LR 生活小知識： https://bit.ly/3j42fjI 科學小知識 https://bit.ly/2DyyDuu 健康小知識 https://bit.ly/3egiPJj 動畫謎語 https://bit.ly/3iyXDDs ---------------------------- 【參考資料】 https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tithonus | Tithonus - Wikipedia https://www.gcores.com/articles/137159 | 希腊神话中玫瑰色手指的曙光女神：厄俄斯 | 机核 GCORES https://www.bostonmagazine.com/health/2019/10/29/david-sinclair/ | Has Harvard's David Sinclair Found the Fountain of Youth? https://tw.news.yahoo.com/%E6%88%91%E5%80%91%E6%87%89%E8%A9%B2%E6%B0%B8%E9%81%A0%E6%B4%BB%E8%91%97%E5%97%8E-%E7%9F%BD%E8%B0%B7%E8%88%88%E8%B5%B7%E8%BF%BD%E6%B1%82%E6%B0%B8%E7%94%9F%E7%86%B1%E6%BD%AE-%E7%A0%94%E7%A9%B6-%E6%B2%BB%E7%99%92%E8%A1%B0%E8%80%81-%E8%97%A5%E7%89%A9-014001415.html | 「我們應該永遠活著嗎？！」矽谷興起追求永生熱潮，研究「治癒衰老」藥物 https://www.cell.com/cell/fulltext/S0092-8674(13)00645-4?_returnURL=https://linkinghub.elsevier.com/retrieve/pii/S0092867413006454?showall=true | The Hallmarks of Aging: Cell https://blogs.scientificamerican.com/guest-blog/beyond-resveratrol-the-anti-aging-nad-fad/ | Beyond Resveratrol: The Anti-Aging NAD Fad - Scientific American Blog Network https://perspectivesinmedicine.cshlp.org/content/5/12/a025965.full | Has the Rate of Human Aging Already Been Modified? https://www.msdmanuals.cn/home/older-people%E2%80%99s-health-issues/the-aging-body/changes-in-the-body-with-aging | 伴随衰老出现的身体变化 - 老年人的健康问题 - 《默沙东诊疗手册大众版》 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ySAbF9h2vDg | Why I Spend $2 Million A Year To Look 18 Years Old Again - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NdZHo3xuZvw | YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EPBFuzkABBo | You trying the impossible? Go to sleep. - YouTube https://www.un.org/development/desa/pd/sites/www.un.org.development.desa.pd/files/undesa_pd_2022_wpp_key-messages.pdf | undesa_pd_2022_wpp_key-messages.pdf https://www.un.org/development/desa/pd/sites/www.un.org.development.desa.pd/files/wpp2022_summary_of_results.pdf | wpp2022_summary_of_results.pdf https://ws.ndc.gov.tw/Download.ashx?u=LzAwMS9hZG1pbmlzdHJhdG9yLzEwL3JlbGZpbGUvMC80ODI4LzZkNDE5ZDM4LThmNzktNDk3ZS05NmJlLTY0OGE2YTM2OWM1My5wZGY%3D\u0026n=6KuW6KGhMTEtMTBfNC7kurrlj6PogIHljJblsIjovK9f5YWo55CD5Lq65Y%2Bj6ICB5YyW5LmL54%2B%2B5rOB6IiH6Lao5YuiLnBkZg%3D%3D\u0026icon=..pdf | Download.ashx https://www.zhihu.com/question/22786066 | 什么是表观遗传学，为什么说基因遗传学被表观遗传学动摇了，请用外行能听懂的方式讲讲？ - 知乎 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9nXop2lLDa4 | David Sinclair | Why We Age and Why We Don't Have To | Talks at Google - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=n9IxomBusuw | Dr. David Sinclair: The Biology of Slowing \u0026 Reversing Aging | Huberman Lab Podcast #52 - YouTube https://www.cdc.gov/genomics/disease/epigenetics.htm#:~:text=While%20genetic%20changes%20can%20alter,and%20your%20behaviors%20and%20environment. | What is Epigenetics? | CDC https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E9%81%97%E4%BC%A0%E5%AD%A6 | 遺傳學 - 維基百科，自由的百科全書 https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E8%A1%A8%E8%A7%80%E9%81%BA%E5%82%B3%E5%AD%B8 | 表觀遺傳學 - 維基百科，自由的百科全書
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gJM1VvwoaWs
結帳時輸入折扣碼「weisway」，售價再折 300 元！
點擊前往課程頁面：https://bit.ly/3TkxADp
如果你已經超過 30 歲，或正在面對老化的焦慮，不妨來看看姜冠宇醫師的【老化全方位應對手冊】！

------------------------
【歡迎加入會員】
https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD

【訂閱按這裡】
https://bit.ly/38OqWfl

【維C Line貼圖】
https://line.me/S/sticker/13483644

【目錄】
00:00 介紹
00:53 全球正在老年化
02:48 你希望長生不老嗎？
04:09 老化機制
08:17 逆齡真的存在？
09:13 姜冠宇線上課程
10:24 如何老得比別人慢
14:59 精選留言+ 記得分享喔

--------------------------------------------

【想當YouTuber的按這裡】
數據分析工具（免費）
https://bit.ly/2CurquY

想學動畫！（有免費的）
https://bit.ly/393B8kd

----------------------------
【其他平台按這裡】
Facebook： 維思維 
https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ 

IG ：weisway18 
https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/

----------------------------
【推薦你的影片】
你有「反社會人格」？：https://bit.ly/38UyyNd
為什麼鏡子裡的你比照片好看！https://bit.ly/2WaJDEM
如何控制夢？   ： https://bit.ly/2AQZb9l
為什麼聽自己錄音會覺得難聽？https://bit.ly/3elDRXh
失眠？這樣做！: https://bit.ly/2Cm6DJT
你到底是「內向」還是「社交恐懼症」！：https://bit.ly/2OgD9Qn

--------------------
【播放列表】
心理學小知識 https://bit.ly/3gUi1LR 
生活小知識： https://bit.ly/3j42fjI 
科學小知識 https://bit.ly/2DyyDuu 
健康小知識 https://bit.ly/3egiPJj 
動畫謎語 https://bit.ly/3iyXDDs

----------------------------
【參考資料】
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tithonus | Tithonus - Wikipedia
https://www.gcores.com/articles/137159 | 希腊神话中玫瑰色手指的曙光女神：厄俄斯 | 机核 GCORES
https://www.bostonmagazine.com/health/2019/10/29/david-sinclair/ | Has Harvard's David Sinclair Found the Fountain of Youth?
https://tw.news.yahoo.com/%E6%88%91%E5%80%91%E6%87%89%E8%A9%B2%E6%B0%B8%E9%81%A0%E6%B4%BB%E8%91%97%E5%97%8E-%E7%9F%BD%E8%B0%B7%E8%88%88%E8%B5%B7%E8%BF%BD%E6%B1%82%E6%B0%B8%E7%94%9F%E7%86%B1%E6%BD%AE-%E7%A0%94%E7%A9%B6-%E6%B2%BB%E7%99%92%E8%A1%B0%E8%80%81-%E8%97%A5%E7%89%A9-014001415.html | 「我們應該永遠活著嗎？！」矽谷興起追求永生熱潮，研究「治癒衰老」藥物
https://www.cell.com/cell/fulltext/S0092-8674(13)00645-4?_returnURL=https://linkinghub.elsevier.com/retrieve/pii/S0092867413006454?showall=true | The Hallmarks of Aging: Cell
https://blogs.scientificamerican.com/guest-blog/beyond-resveratrol-the-anti-aging-nad-fad/ | Beyond Resveratrol: The Anti-Aging NAD Fad - Scientific American Blog Network
https://perspectivesinmedicine.cshlp.org/content/5/12/a025965.full | Has the Rate of Human Aging Already Been Modified?
https://www.msdmanuals.cn/home/older-people%E2%80%99s-health-issues/the-aging-body/changes-in-the-body-with-aging | 伴随衰老出现的身体变化 - 老年人的健康问题 - 《默沙东诊疗手册大众版》
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ySAbF9h2vDg | Why I Spend $2 Million A Year To Look 18 Years Old Again - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NdZHo3xuZvw | YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EPBFuzkABBo | You trying the impossible? Go to sleep. - YouTube
https://www.un.org/development/desa/pd/sites/www.un.org.development.desa.pd/files/undesa_pd_2022_wpp_key-messages.pdf | undesa_pd_2022_wpp_key-messages.pdf
https://www.un.org/development/desa/pd/sites/www.un.org.development.desa.pd/files/wpp2022_summary_of_results.pdf | wpp2022_summary_of_results.pdf
https://ws.ndc.gov.tw/Download.ashx?u=LzAwMS9hZG1pbmlzdHJhdG9yLzEwL3JlbGZpbGUvMC80ODI4LzZkNDE5ZDM4LThmNzktNDk3ZS05NmJlLTY0OGE2YTM2OWM1My5wZGY%3D\u0026n=6KuW6KGhMTEtMTBfNC7kurrlj6PogIHljJblsIjovK9f5YWo55CD5Lq65Y%2Bj6ICB5YyW5LmL54%2B%2B5rOB6IiH6Lao5YuiLnBkZg%3D%3D\u0026icon=..pdf | Download.ashx
https://www.zhihu.com/question/22786066 | 什么是表观遗传学，为什么说基因遗传学被表观遗传学动摇了，请用外行能听懂的方式讲讲？ - 知乎
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9nXop2lLDa4 | David Sinclair | Why We Age and Why We Don't Have To | Talks at Google - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=n9IxomBusuw | Dr. David Sinclair: The Biology of Slowing \u0026 Reversing Aging | Huberman Lab Podcast #52 - YouTube
https://www.cdc.gov/genomics/disease/epigenetics.htm#:~:text=While%20genetic%20changes%20can%20alter,and%20your%20behaviors%20and%20environment. | What is Epigenetics? | CDC
https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E9%81%97%E4%BC%A0%E5%AD%A6 | 遺傳學 - 維基百科，自由的百科全書
https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E8%A1%A8%E8%A7%80%E9%81%BA%E5%82%B3%E5%AD%B8 | 表觀遺傳學 - 維基百科，自由的百科全書

item.title: 11.4]4種「相剋人格」說話術，輕鬆聊到對方心裡！DISC 人格分析！【心理學】 | 維思維
item.itunes:title: 11.4]4種「相剋人格」說話術，輕鬆聊到對方心裡！DISC 人格分析！【心理學】 | 維思維
item.itunes:author: 維思維WeisWay
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1ChVmWr0NCA DISC人格分析 ------------------------ 【歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD 【訂閱按這裡】 https://bit.ly/38OqWfl 【維C Line貼圖】 https://line.me/S/sticker/13483644 【目錄】 00:00 介紹 00:55 什麼是DISC 02:57 Dominance 掌控型 04:05 Influence 影響型 05:05 Steadiness 穩健型 06:08 Conscientious 盡責型 07:21 測試方法 08:20 相剋人格說話術 11:11 精選留言+ 及分享喔 -------------------------------------------- 【想當YouTuber的按這裡】 數據分析工具（免費） https://bit.ly/2CurquY 想學動畫！（有免費的） https://bit.ly/393B8kd ---------------------------- 【其他平台按這裡】 Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/ ---------------------------- 【推薦你的影片】 你有「反社會人格」？：https://bit.ly/38UyyNd 為什麼鏡子裡的你比照片好看！https://bit.ly/2WaJDEM 如何控制夢？ ： https://bit.ly/2AQZb9l 為什麼聽自己錄音會覺得難聽？https://bit.ly/3elDRXh 失眠？這樣做！: https://bit.ly/2Cm6DJT 你到底是「內向」還是「社交恐懼症」！：https://bit.ly/2OgD9Qn -------------------- 【播放列表】 心理學小知識 https://bit.ly/3gUi1LR 生活小知識： https://bit.ly/3j42fjI 科學小知識 https://bit.ly/2DyyDuu 健康小知識 https://bit.ly/3egiPJj 動畫謎語 https://bit.ly/3iyXDDs -------------------- 【參考資料】 https://www.discprofile.com/what-is-disc/disc-styles/dominance | DiSC D styles - DiSC Profile https://www.discprofile.com/what-is-disc/disc-styles/influence | DiSC i styles - DiSC Profile https://www.discprofile.com/what-is-disc/disc-styles/steadiness | DiSC S styles - DiSC Profile https://www.discprofile.com/what-is-disc/disc-styles/conscientiousness | DiSC C styles - DiSC Profile https://www.google.com/search?q=disc\u0026rlz=1C6CHFA_enMY914MY915\u0026sca_esv=578818476\u0026sxsrf=AM9HkKk07kyn-Hg3kpaIOWZhq4ncDvy0tQ%3A1698931633563\u0026source=hp\u0026ei=saNDZa7qHd7Q1e8Pwcqe6A0\u0026iflsig=AO6bgOgAAAAAZUOxwVt_Eqq9FajCbjenkIpbP325eVYy\u0026ved=0ahUKEwjuhozEtaWCAxVeaPUHHUGlB90Q4dUDCAo\u0026uact=5\u0026oq=disc\u0026gs_lp=Egdnd3Mtd2l6IgRkaXNjSABQAFgAcAB4AJABAJgBAKABAKoBALgBA8gBAA\u0026sclient=gws-wiz | disc - Google Search https://discpersonalitytesting.com/free-disc-test/ | Free DISC Test - DISC Personality Testing https://www.123test.com/disc-personality-test/ | DISC personality test (2023) | take this free DISC assessment at 123test.com https://www.tonyrobbins.com/disc/ | DISC Assessment: Free personality test and DISC profile https://www.everythingdisc.cn/EverythingDiSC/media/SiteFiles/Assets/History/ED-CN-web-resources-aboutdisc.pdf | ED-CN-web-resources-aboutdisc.pdf https://medium.com/moodwide/%E6%80%8E%E9%BA%BC%E6%A8%A3%E7%9C%8B%E5%88%B0%E5%9C%98%E9%9A%8A%E6%88%90%E5%93%A1%E7%9A%84-%E7%89%B9%E8%B3%AA-disc%E5%B9%AB%E6%88%91%E5%80%91%E7%9B%A4%E9%BB%9E%E8%87%AA%E6%88%91%E6%95%98%E8%BF%B0-%E5%84%AA%E7%BC%BA%E9%BB%9E%E8%88%87%E5%A3%93%E5%8A%9B%E4%B8%8B%E7%9A%84%E5%8F%8D%E6%87%89-%E4%B8%80-%E7%B8%BD%E8%A6%BD-350b5900d2ed | 怎麼樣看到團隊成員的「特質」？DISC幫我們盤點自我敘述、優缺點與壓力下的反應——總覽 | by George Chan | moodwide | Medium https://archive.org/details/emotionsofnormal032195mbp/mode/2up | Emotions Of Normal People : Marston, William Moulton : Free Download, Borrow, and Streaming : Internet Archive https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/DISC_assessment | DISC assessment - Wikipedia https://www.researchgate.net/figure/DiSC-styles-and-priorities-driving-behaviour-with-2-dimensional-scales_fig2_336624484 | DiSC styles and priorities driving behaviour with 2-dimensional scales | Download Scientific Diagram https://www.everythingdisc.com/EverythingDiSC/media/SiteFiles/Assets/History/Everything-DiSC-Research-Report.pdf | Scale
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1ChVmWr0NCA DISC人格分析 ------------------------ 【歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD 【訂閱按這裡】 https://bit.ly/38OqWfl 【維C Line貼圖】 https://line.me/S/sticker/13483644 【目錄】 00:00 介紹 00:55 什麼是DISC 02:57 Dominance 掌控型 04:05 Influence 影響型 05:05 Steadiness 穩健型 06:08 Conscientious 盡責型 07:21 測試方法 08:20 相剋人格說話術 11:11 精選留言+ 及分享喔 -------------------------------------------- 【想當YouTuber的按這裡】 數據分析工具（免費） https://bit.ly/2CurquY 想學動畫！（有免費的） https://bit.ly/393B8kd ---------------------------- 【其他平台按這裡】 Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/ ---------------------------- 【推薦你的影片】 你有「反社會人格」？：https://bit.ly/38UyyNd 為什麼鏡子裡的你比照片好看！https://bit.ly/2WaJDEM 如何控制夢？ ： https://bit.ly/2AQZb9l 為什麼聽自己錄音會覺得難聽？https://bit.ly/3elDRXh 失眠？這樣做！: https://bit.ly/2Cm6DJT 你到底是「內向」還是「社交恐懼症」！：https://bit.ly/2OgD9Qn -------------------- 【播放列表】 心理學小知識 https://bit.ly/3gUi1LR 生活小知識： https://bit.ly/3j42fjI 科學小知識 https://bit.ly/2DyyDuu 健康小知識 https://bit.ly/3egiPJj 動畫謎語 https://bit.ly/3iyXDDs -------------------- 【參考資料】 https://www.discprofile.com/what-is-disc/disc-styles/dominance | DiSC D styles - DiSC Profile https://www.discprofile.com/what-is-disc/disc-styles/influence | DiSC i styles - DiSC Profile https://www.discprofile.com/what-is-disc/disc-styles/steadiness | DiSC S styles - DiSC Profile https://www.discprofile.com/what-is-disc/disc-styles/conscientiousness | DiSC C styles - DiSC Profile https://www.google.com/search?q=disc\u0026rlz=1C6CHFA_enMY914MY915\u0026sca_esv=578818476\u0026sxsrf=AM9HkKk07kyn-Hg3kpaIOWZhq4ncDvy0tQ%3A1698931633563\u0026source=hp\u0026ei=saNDZa7qHd7Q1e8Pwcqe6A0\u0026iflsig=AO6bgOgAAAAAZUOxwVt_Eqq9FajCbjenkIpbP325eVYy\u0026ved=0ahUKEwjuhozEtaWCAxVeaPUHHUGlB90Q4dUDCAo\u0026uact=5\u0026oq=disc\u0026gs_lp=Egdnd3Mtd2l6IgRkaXNjSABQAFgAcAB4AJABAJgBAKABAKoBALgBA8gBAA\u0026sclient=gws-wiz | disc - Google Search https://discpersonalitytesting.com/free-disc-test/ | Free DISC Test - DISC Personality Testing https://www.123test.com/disc-personality-test/ | DISC personality test (2023) | take this free DISC assessment at 123test.com https://www.tonyrobbins.com/disc/ | DISC Assessment: Free personality test and DISC profile https://www.everythingdisc.cn/EverythingDiSC/media/SiteFiles/Assets/History/ED-CN-web-resources-aboutdisc.pdf | ED-CN-web-resources-aboutdisc.pdf https://medium.com/moodwide/%E6%80%8E%E9%BA%BC%E6%A8%A3%E7%9C%8B%E5%88%B0%E5%9C%98%E9%9A%8A%E6%88%90%E5%93%A1%E7%9A%84-%E7%89%B9%E8%B3%AA-disc%E5%B9%AB%E6%88%91%E5%80%91%E7%9B%A4%E9%BB%9E%E8%87%AA%E6%88%91%E6%95%98%E8%BF%B0-%E5%84%AA%E7%BC%BA%E9%BB%9E%E8%88%87%E5%A3%93%E5%8A%9B%E4%B8%8B%E7%9A%84%E5%8F%8D%E6%87%89-%E4%B8%80-%E7%B8%BD%E8%A6%BD-350b5900d2ed | 怎麼樣看到團隊成員的「特質」？DISC幫我們盤點自我敘述、優缺點與壓力下的反應——總覽 | by George Chan | moodwide | Medium https://archive.org/details/emotionsofnormal032195mbp/mode/2up | Emotions Of Normal People : Marston, William Moulton : Free Download, Borrow, and Streaming : Internet Archive https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/DISC_assessment | DISC assessment - Wikipedia https://www.researchgate.net/figure/DiSC-styles-and-priorities-driving-behaviour-with-2-dimensional-scales_fig2_336624484 | DiSC styles and priorities driving behaviour with 2-dimensional scales | Download Scientific Diagram https://www.everythingdisc.com/EverythingDiSC/media/SiteFiles/Assets/History/Everything-DiSC-Research-Report.pdf | Scale
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1ChVmWr0NCA
DISC人格分析

------------------------
【歡迎加入會員】
https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD

【訂閱按這裡】
https://bit.ly/38OqWfl

【維C Line貼圖】
https://line.me/S/sticker/13483644

【目錄】
00:00 介紹
00:55 什麼是DISC
02:57 Dominance 掌控型
04:05 Influence 影響型
05:05 Steadiness 穩健型
06:08 Conscientious 盡責型
07:21 測試方法
08:20 相剋人格說話術
11:11 精選留言+ 及分享喔

--------------------------------------------

【想當YouTuber的按這裡】
數據分析工具（免費）
https://bit.ly/2CurquY

想學動畫！（有免費的）
https://bit.ly/393B8kd

----------------------------
【其他平台按這裡】
Facebook： 維思維 
https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ 

IG ：weisway18 
https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/

----------------------------
【推薦你的影片】
你有「反社會人格」？：https://bit.ly/38UyyNd
為什麼鏡子裡的你比照片好看！https://bit.ly/2WaJDEM
如何控制夢？   ： https://bit.ly/2AQZb9l
為什麼聽自己錄音會覺得難聽？https://bit.ly/3elDRXh
失眠？這樣做！: https://bit.ly/2Cm6DJT
你到底是「內向」還是「社交恐懼症」！：https://bit.ly/2OgD9Qn

--------------------
【播放列表】
心理學小知識 https://bit.ly/3gUi1LR 
生活小知識： https://bit.ly/3j42fjI 
科學小知識 https://bit.ly/2DyyDuu 
健康小知識 https://bit.ly/3egiPJj 
動畫謎語 https://bit.ly/3iyXDDs

--------------------
【參考資料】
https://www.discprofile.com/what-is-disc/disc-styles/dominance | DiSC D styles - DiSC Profile
https://www.discprofile.com/what-is-disc/disc-styles/influence | DiSC i styles - DiSC Profile
https://www.discprofile.com/what-is-disc/disc-styles/steadiness | DiSC S styles - DiSC Profile
https://www.discprofile.com/what-is-disc/disc-styles/conscientiousness | DiSC C styles - DiSC Profile
https://www.google.com/search?q=disc\u0026rlz=1C6CHFA_enMY914MY915\u0026sca_esv=578818476\u0026sxsrf=AM9HkKk07kyn-Hg3kpaIOWZhq4ncDvy0tQ%3A1698931633563\u0026source=hp\u0026ei=saNDZa7qHd7Q1e8Pwcqe6A0\u0026iflsig=AO6bgOgAAAAAZUOxwVt_Eqq9FajCbjenkIpbP325eVYy\u0026ved=0ahUKEwjuhozEtaWCAxVeaPUHHUGlB90Q4dUDCAo\u0026uact=5\u0026oq=disc\u0026gs_lp=Egdnd3Mtd2l6IgRkaXNjSABQAFgAcAB4AJABAJgBAKABAKoBALgBA8gBAA\u0026sclient=gws-wiz | disc - Google Search
https://discpersonalitytesting.com/free-disc-test/ | Free DISC Test - DISC Personality Testing
https://www.123test.com/disc-personality-test/ | DISC personality test (2023) | take this free DISC assessment at 123test.com
https://www.tonyrobbins.com/disc/ | DISC Assessment: Free personality test and DISC profile
https://www.everythingdisc.cn/EverythingDiSC/media/SiteFiles/Assets/History/ED-CN-web-resources-aboutdisc.pdf | ED-CN-web-resources-aboutdisc.pdf
https://medium.com/moodwide/%E6%80%8E%E9%BA%BC%E6%A8%A3%E7%9C%8B%E5%88%B0%E5%9C%98%E9%9A%8A%E6%88%90%E5%93%A1%E7%9A%84-%E7%89%B9%E8%B3%AA-disc%E5%B9%AB%E6%88%91%E5%80%91%E7%9B%A4%E9%BB%9E%E8%87%AA%E6%88%91%E6%95%98%E8%BF%B0-%E5%84%AA%E7%BC%BA%E9%BB%9E%E8%88%87%E5%A3%93%E5%8A%9B%E4%B8%8B%E7%9A%84%E5%8F%8D%E6%87%89-%E4%B8%80-%E7%B8%BD%E8%A6%BD-350b5900d2ed | 怎麼樣看到團隊成員的「特質」？DISC幫我們盤點自我敘述、優缺點與壓力下的反應——總覽 | by George Chan | moodwide | Medium
https://archive.org/details/emotionsofnormal032195mbp/mode/2up | Emotions Of Normal People : Marston, William Moulton : Free Download, Borrow, and Streaming : Internet Archive
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/DISC_assessment | DISC assessment - Wikipedia
https://www.researchgate.net/figure/DiSC-styles-and-priorities-driving-behaviour-with-2-dimensional-scales_fig2_336624484 | DiSC styles and priorities driving behaviour with 2-dimensional scales | Download Scientific Diagram
https://www.everythingdisc.com/EverythingDiSC/media/SiteFiles/Assets/History/Everything-DiSC-Research-Report.pdf | Scale

item.title: 10.21]為什麼你總是感到很累？小心掉入慢性疲勞！7步高效休息法！【睡眠】 | 維思維
item.itunes:title: 10.21]為什麼你總是感到很累？小心掉入慢性疲勞！7步高效休息法！【睡眠】 | 維思維
item.itunes:author: 維思維WeisWay
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qiZTrXUzu7A 如何消除慢疲勞？ ------------------------ 【歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD 【訂閱按這裡】 https://bit.ly/38OqWfl 【維C Line貼圖】 https://line.me/S/sticker/13483644 【目錄】 00:00 介紹 00:56 人為什麼會疲勞 05:10 導致你很累的原因 11:49 高效休息法 16:35 精選留言+記得分享哦 -------------------------------------------- 【想當YouTuber的按這裡】 數據分析工具（免費） https://bit.ly/2CurquY 想學動畫！（有免費的） https://bit.ly/393B8kd ---------------------------- 【其他平台按這裡】 Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/ ---------------------------- 【推薦你的影片】 你有「反社會人格」？：https://bit.ly/38UyyNd 為什麼鏡子裡的你比照片好看！https://bit.ly/2WaJDEM 如何控制夢？ ： https://bit.ly/2AQZb9l 為什麼聽自己錄音會覺得難聽？https://bit.ly/3elDRXh 失眠？這樣做！: https://bit.ly/2Cm6DJT 你到底是「內向」還是「社交恐懼症」！：https://bit.ly/2OgD9Qn -------------------- 【播放列表】 心理學小知識 https://bit.ly/3gUi1LR 生活小知識： https://bit.ly/3j42fjI 科學小知識 https://bit.ly/2DyyDuu 健康小知識 https://bit.ly/3egiPJj 動畫謎語 https://bit.ly/3iyXDDs -------------------- 【參考資料】 https://kb.commonhealth.com.tw/library/650.html | 慢性疲勞症候群是什麼？一次了解慢性疲勞症候群症狀、治療以及如何預防 - 康健知識庫 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uAvs_0Nctek | Why Am I Always Tired? Avoid These 6 Energy Vampires | Exhausted - YouTube https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/115473723 | 人体的能量机制，能量工厂-线粒体的前世今生！ - 知乎 https://www.meresearch.org.uk/mitochondria-overview/ | Mitochondria – An overview of structure and function https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC2680051/#:~:text=The%20%E2%80%9CATP%20profile%E2%80%9D%20test%20is,due%20to%20cellular%20respiration%20dysfunction. | Chronic fatigue syndrome and mitochondrial dysfunction - PMC https://zh.khanacademy.org/science/biology/energy-and-enzymes/atp-reaction-coupling/a/atp-and-reaction-coupling | 可汗学院 https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/20164566/ | Caffeine and adenosine - PubMed https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC4373791/ | The role of adenosine receptors in the central action of caffeine - PMC https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1xwaG-GBHIU | Mitochondria Aren't Just the Powerhouse of the Cell - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7bLMl6whc9E | This Is How Your Body Turns Food Into Energy - YouTube https://askthescientists.com/zh-hant/cellular-energy-production/ | 了解ATP——10個細胞能量的問題與解答 - Ask The Scientists https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Blood_sugar_level | Blood sugar level - Wikipedia https://helloinside.com/en/blogs/insider/glucose-curves-explained | https://blog.health2sync.com/how-food-affect-my-glucose-level-and-health/ | 營養師教你吃！5個不怕高血糖的飲食秘訣 - 智抗糖部落格
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qiZTrXUzu7A 如何消除慢疲勞？ ------------------------ 【歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD 【訂閱按這裡】 https://bit.ly/38OqWfl 【維C Line貼圖】 https://line.me/S/sticker/13483644 【目錄】 00:00 介紹 00:56 人為什麼會疲勞 05:10 導致你很累的原因 11:49 高效休息法 16:35 精選留言+記得分享哦 -------------------------------------------- 【想當YouTuber的按這裡】 數據分析工具（免費） https://bit.ly/2CurquY 想學動畫！（有免費的） https://bit.ly/393B8kd ---------------------------- 【其他平台按這裡】 Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/ ---------------------------- 【推薦你的影片】 你有「反社會人格」？：https://bit.ly/38UyyNd 為什麼鏡子裡的你比照片好看！https://bit.ly/2WaJDEM 如何控制夢？ ： https://bit.ly/2AQZb9l 為什麼聽自己錄音會覺得難聽？https://bit.ly/3elDRXh 失眠？這樣做！: https://bit.ly/2Cm6DJT 你到底是「內向」還是「社交恐懼症」！：https://bit.ly/2OgD9Qn -------------------- 【播放列表】 心理學小知識 https://bit.ly/3gUi1LR 生活小知識： https://bit.ly/3j42fjI 科學小知識 https://bit.ly/2DyyDuu 健康小知識 https://bit.ly/3egiPJj 動畫謎語 https://bit.ly/3iyXDDs -------------------- 【參考資料】 https://kb.commonhealth.com.tw/library/650.html | 慢性疲勞症候群是什麼？一次了解慢性疲勞症候群症狀、治療以及如何預防 - 康健知識庫 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uAvs_0Nctek | Why Am I Always Tired? Avoid These 6 Energy Vampires | Exhausted - YouTube https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/115473723 | 人体的能量机制，能量工厂-线粒体的前世今生！ - 知乎 https://www.meresearch.org.uk/mitochondria-overview/ | Mitochondria – An overview of structure and function https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC2680051/#:~:text=The%20%E2%80%9CATP%20profile%E2%80%9D%20test%20is,due%20to%20cellular%20respiration%20dysfunction. | Chronic fatigue syndrome and mitochondrial dysfunction - PMC https://zh.khanacademy.org/science/biology/energy-and-enzymes/atp-reaction-coupling/a/atp-and-reaction-coupling | 可汗学院 https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/20164566/ | Caffeine and adenosine - PubMed https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC4373791/ | The role of adenosine receptors in the central action of caffeine - PMC https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1xwaG-GBHIU | Mitochondria Aren't Just the Powerhouse of the Cell - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7bLMl6whc9E | This Is How Your Body Turns Food Into Energy - YouTube https://askthescientists.com/zh-hant/cellular-energy-production/ | 了解ATP——10個細胞能量的問題與解答 - Ask The Scientists https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Blood_sugar_level | Blood sugar level - Wikipedia https://helloinside.com/en/blogs/insider/glucose-curves-explained | https://blog.health2sync.com/how-food-affect-my-glucose-level-and-health/ | 營養師教你吃！5個不怕高血糖的飲食秘訣 - 智抗糖部落格
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qiZTrXUzu7A
如何消除慢疲勞？
------------------------
【歡迎加入會員】
https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD

【參考資料】
https://kb.commonhealth.com.tw/library/650.html | 慢性疲勞症候群是什麼？一次了解慢性疲勞症候群症狀、治療以及如何預防 - 康健知識庫
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uAvs_0Nctek | Why Am I Always Tired? Avoid These 6 Energy Vampires | Exhausted - YouTube
https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/115473723 | 人体的能量机制，能量工厂-线粒体的前世今生！ - 知乎
https://www.meresearch.org.uk/mitochondria-overview/ | Mitochondria – An overview of structure and function
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC2680051/#:~:text=The%20%E2%80%9CATP%20profile%E2%80%9D%20test%20is,due%20to%20cellular%20respiration%20dysfunction. | Chronic fatigue syndrome and mitochondrial dysfunction - PMC
https://zh.khanacademy.org/science/biology/energy-and-enzymes/atp-reaction-coupling/a/atp-and-reaction-coupling | 可汗学院
https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/20164566/ | Caffeine and adenosine - PubMed
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC4373791/ | The role of adenosine receptors in the central action of caffeine - PMC
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1xwaG-GBHIU | Mitochondria Aren't Just the Powerhouse of the Cell - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7bLMl6whc9E | This Is How Your Body Turns Food Into Energy - YouTube
https://askthescientists.com/zh-hant/cellular-energy-production/ | 了解ATP——10個細胞能量的問題與解答 - Ask The Scientists
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Blood_sugar_level | Blood sugar level - Wikipedia
https://helloinside.com/en/blogs/insider/glucose-curves-explained | 
https://blog.health2sync.com/how-food-affect-my-glucose-level-and-health/ | 營養師教你吃！5個不怕高血糖的飲食秘訣 - 智抗糖部落格

05:05 你很可能也有的倖存者偏差
06:11 網絡上常見的倖存者偏差
09:13 被濫用的倖存者偏差
11:29 如何避免倖存者偏差
